🚀 Big Launches.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
🚀 Big Launches.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
🚀 Big Launches.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval

🎯 Interview Edge.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

tool_of_day.title: dd-cli
tool_of_day.summary: A command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal.

hot_take: The AI industry is rapidly evolving, with companies like Google and Roblox launching new AI-powered features and tools, while regulatory bodies like the EU are pushing for greater interoperability and access to key technologies.
